creator: pgollucci@FreeBSD.org
text:
httpd, apr, apr-util, and pcre all  have A ./configure they do not accept the same options
See PR: ports/130437 as an example for devel/apr

Blocks at least: ports/83644 and possibly ports/110651  ports/128078

checking for APR... reconfig
configuring package in srclib/apr now
configure: WARNING: Unrecognized options: --with-perl, --with-port, --with-expat, --with-iconv, --enable-v4-mapped, --with-ldap, --with-ldap-lib, --with-ldap-include, --with-dbm, --with-ssl, --disable-access, --disable-auth, --disable-charset-lite, --disable-include, --disable-log-config, --disable-env, --disable-setenvif, --disable-mime, --disable-status, --disable-autoindex, --disable-asis, --disable-cgid, --disable-cgi, --disable-negotiation, --disable-dir, --disable-imap, --disable-actions, --disable-userdir, --disable-alias, --enable-so, --enable-mods-shared, --with-mpm
